samples.xml_description:
Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations. Clock input. Active-low reset input. Start signal to initiate multiplication. Multiplicand input. Multiplier input. Product output. Done signal indicating multiplication completion. Shift count register. Assume i is 16-bit register. 0 1 [16'd16] 0 1 Assume done is a 1-bit register. [16'd16] 1 0

Reset the registers.

0 0

Start signal is active.

1 1 [16'd17]

Shift and accumulate.

1 [16'd17]

Shift count register is 0.

0 0

Store the multiplicand and multiplier.

Shift count register is greater than 0.

0 0

Accumulate the product.

0 [16'd17]

Bit i-1 of the multiplicand register is 1.

[i-1] 0

Shift the multiplier register.

[[15:0],i-1] 0

Shift count register is 17.

[16'd17] 0

Reset the done signal.

[16'd17]

Shift count register is greater than 17.

[16'd17] 0

Reset the done signal.

[16'd17]

   46 |                     yout_r <= yout_r + (breg << (i-1) | 32'b0);
      |                                              ^~
